caribbean.headline: Moderate Winds and Choppy Seas Impact Roatan Today
caribbean.paragraph: Roatan is experiencing moderate easterly winds sustained at 24 knots with wave heights reaching 6.1 feet and a dominant ENE swell period of 9 seconds. Rain probability stands at 30%, signaling intermittent showers, while St. Lucia sees lighter winds near 14 knots and less than 10% rain probability.

mediterranean.headline: Calm Mediterranean Winds and Moderate Swells Persist
mediterranean.paragraph: Lisbon is experiencing moderate westerly winds at 15 kt with wave heights reaching 3.6 ft and a swell period of 13 seconds from the WNW. Rain probability remains less than 10% ensuring stable conditions, while Cadiz reports lighter winds at 11 kt.
